extract: Chandelure (Japanese: シャンデラ Chandela) is a dual-type Ghost/Fire Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Lampent when exposed to a Dusk Stone. It is the final form of Litwick. Chandelure can Mega Evolve into Mega Chandelure using the Chandelurite. Mega Chandelure was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
